Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium rename:
- Renames the plugin listing and windows to The Studium.
- Adds /thestudium as the primary slash command.
- Keeps /greenzone as a legacy command alias for compatibility.
